questions.question_text: What is the highest permitted blood alcohol concentration when you drive a vehicle?

answers.1: A blood alcohol concentration of 0.2.
answers.2: A blood alcohol concentration of 0.5.
answers.3: A blood alcohol concentration of 1.2.
answers.4: A blood alcohol concentration of 2.0.

questions.question_text: The vehicle in front is driving at approximately 40 km/h. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the road markings on the traffic lane.
answers.2: I remain behind the vehicle in front.
answers.3: I give a flashing light signal with my high-beam headlights.
answers.4: I overtake the vehicle in front immediately.

questions.question_text: You are driving at 50 km/h when you enter a built-up area and are approaching a bus. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of 50 km/h.
answers.2: I reduce my speed and hold back for the bus.
answers.3: I warn the bus driver with a short horn signal.
answers.4: I increase my speed and drive around the bus.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 40 km/h and there are no road users behind you. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I give a signal with the horn.
answers.2: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.3: I move my foot over to the brake pedal.
answers.4: I pull towards the centre of the traffic lane.

questions.question_text: You are required to continue straight ahead on the road. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I continue driving slowly.
answers.2: I turn around, as the road is too narrow for passenger cars.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of whether any oncoming traffic appears.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road ahead.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of bicyclists in the traffic lane.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of pedestrians crossing ahead.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of the oncoming traffic.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 50 km/h. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 50 km/h.
answers.2: I reduce my speed.
answers.3: I pull towards the centre of the traffic lane.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of the pedestrian.

questions.question_text: You have reduced your speed to approximately 20 km/h and moved your foot onto the brake pedal before the difficult bend. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the oncoming truck.
answers.2: I increase my speed.
answers.3: I brake in order to give the turning truck space.
answers.4: I pull over as far as possible to the right of the roadway.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 50 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I give a flashing light signal with my high-beam headlights.
answers.2: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 50 km/h.
answers.3: I pull all the way out to the kerb on the right-hand side.
answers.4: I apply my service brake.

questions.question_text: You are driving at 40 km/h and the roadway is very slippery. How will you continue?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the oncoming traffic.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road ahead.
answers.3: I pull over as far as possible to the right of the roadway.
answers.4: I move my foot over to the brake pedal.

questions.question_text: You are driving at 50 km/h and have caught up with the passenger car that is driving very slowly. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 50 km/h.
answers.2: I overtake the passenger car.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of the side road.
answers.4: I move my foot over to the brake pedal.

questions.question_text: You have caught up with the bicyclists and there are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I give a signal with the horn.
answers.2: I cross the centre line and begin overtaking the first bicyclist.
answers.3: I overtake immediately without crossing the centre line.
answers.4: I reduce my speed and remain behind the bicyclists for the time being.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 40 km/h and are required to continue straight ahead. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.2: I overtake the passenger car on the right immediately.
answers.3: I pull out towards the kerb on the right-hand side.
answers.4: I brake and remain behind the passenger car.

questions.question_text: You wish to turn left as soon as possible. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I activate my left-turn indicator immediately.
answers.2: I wait a while before signalling with my indicator.
answers.3: I turn left at the first side road once the lane is clear.
answers.4: I wait until the next side road before turning.

questions.question_text: You are driving at 30 to 40 km/h and are required to continue straight ahead on the road. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed between 30 and 40 km/h.
answers.2: I keep my foot ready on the brake pedal.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of the pedestrians.
answers.4: I apply my service brake.

questions.question_text: You have reduced your speed to 30 km/h in order to turn right. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 30 km/h.
answers.2: I reduce my speed.
answers.3: I turn right immediately.
answers.4: I hold back for the bicyclist and check my blind spot before turning.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of a bit further ahead?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of a dangerous bend in the road.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of the merge rule where the traffic lanes come together.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of the rule for changing traffic lanes.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful that the motorway is coming to an end.

questions.question_text: You are driving on a motorway. What must you be particularly mindful of a bit further ahead?

answers.1: Drivers wishing to enter the motorway have a duty to give way to all traffic.
answers.2: I have a duty to give way to all traffic.
answers.3: Drivers are having difficulty entering the motorway.
answers.4: I can assist them by changing to the far left lane.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of areas with speed bumps.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful that this is a residential area.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful that young children are permitted to play in the roadway.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 60 km/h and are about to enter the motorway. How will you continue?

answers.1: I increase my speed.
answers.2: I merge in immediately after the black passenger car.
answers.3: I move my foot over to the brake pedal.
answers.4: I hold back until the roadway behind me is clear before entering the motorway.

questions.question_text: You have stepped out of the red passenger car. According to the legal provisions, which of the following applies here?

answers.1: I am permitted to park the passenger car here.
answers.2: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for 2 to 3 minutes.
answers.3: Stopping the passenger car is prohibited here.

questions.question_text: You are stationary and are about to set off from the kerb. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I set off immediately.
answers.2: I turn my head and check that the roadway is clear behind me.
answers.3: Once the lane behind me is clear, I drive out from the kerb slowly.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of the oncoming traffic.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 20 to 30 km/h, the same as the motorcyclist in front. You are required to continue straight ahead on the road, which contains a bend. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed between 20 and 30 km/h.
answers.2: I increase my speed.
answers.3: I brake gently.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of the road condition.

questions.question_text: You have stepped out of the red passenger car. According to the legal provisions, which of the following applies here?

answers.1: I am permitted to park the passenger car here.
answers.2: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for 2 to 3 minutes.
answers.3: Stopping and parking are both prohibited here.

questions.question_text: You have stepped out of the red passenger car to run an errand. According to the legal provisions on stopping and parking, which of the following applies here?

answers.1: I am permitted to park the passenger car here.
answers.2: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for 2 to 3 minutes.
answers.3: Stopping is prohibited here.
